content.Text: I’m inspecting the Vidly app structure and existing controller/view patterns first so the new service, controller, and feature view match the codebase instead of guessing.

ToolUse.name: Run Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include *.cs,*.cshtml -File | Select-String -Pattern 'class .*Controller|namespace Vidly.Services|InMemoryMovieRepository|InMemoryRentalRepository|interface IMovieRepository|interface IRentalRepository|class Movie|class Rental' | Select-Object Path, LineNumber, Line
